fields.label: Properties
fields.description: Properties of this event.

fields.label: Time
fields.description:
When this event occurred. By default, the time the request was received will be used.
      The time is truncated to the second. The time must be after the year 2000 and can only
      be up to 1 year in the future.

time.title: Time
time.description:
When this event occurred. By default, the time the request was received will be used.
      The time is truncated to the second. The time must be after the year 2000 and can only
      be up to 1 year in the future.

fields.label: Value
fields.description: A numeric value to associate with this event. For example, the dollar amount of a purchase.

value.title: Value
value.description: A numeric value to associate with this event. For example, the dollar amount of a purchase.

fields.label: Unique ID
fields.description:
A unique identifier for an event. If the unique_id is repeated for the same
      profile and metric, only the first processed event will be recorded. If this is not
      present, this will use the time to the second. Using the default, this limits only one
      event per profile per second.

unique_id.title: Unique ID
unique_id.description:
A unique identifier for an event. If the unique_id is repeated for the same
      profile and metric, only the first processed event will be recorded. If this is not
      present, this will use the time to the second. Using the default, this limits only one
      event per profile per second.

fields.label: Custom Source ($source)
fields.description: A custom method or source to detail source of consent preferences (e.g., "Marketing Event"). The default is set to -59, as this is [the $source value associated with Segment](https://help.klaviyo.com/hc/en-us/articles/1260804673530#h_01HDKHG9AM4BSSM009BM6XBF1H).

custom_source.title: Custom Source ($source)

fields.label: Historical Import
fields.description: When set to true, the profile will be subscribed as a historical import. This is useful for importing existing profiles into Klaviyo without sending them an email or SMS.
